stemHtml: A pilot is planning a flight from aerodrome A to aerodrome B using aerodrome C as alternate. The distance from A to B is 120 NM on a true track 090° and the distance from B to C is 60 NM on a true track 360°. If the planned TAS is 100 kt and the forecast wind 300°/20 kt, the planned flight time from A to B will be (1) _____ and from B to C will be (2) _____.
